tool_args.label: Agency MBS positioning statement
tool_args.raw_text: We remain overweight to CMO's as they continue to look compelling in the current market environment. As a core position Agency PT's are favorable relative to other sectors but have found more value in 15's and CMOs.

payload.claim_text: We remain overweight to CMO's as they continue to look compelling in the current market environment. As a core position Agency PT's are favorable relative to other sectors but have found more value in 15's and CMOs.
payload.subject: Agency Mortgages positioning

warnings: claim.source is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Source/program names are relation context, not claim type. Suggested relation: data_provided_by or part_of_program.

tool_args.label: Corporate credit risk assessment
tool_args.raw_text: The unexpected sharp weakening of the US Growth outlook on the back of the harsher than expected reciprocal tariffs has highlighted the asymmetric risk for spread assets when volatility and valuations are compressed. Risk of stagflation damaging corporate earnings, plus tying the hands of monetary policy authorities has led to a material repricing of credit risk.

payload.claim_text: The unexpected sharp weakening of the US Growth outlook on the back of the harsher than expected reciprocal tariffs has highlighted the asymmetric risk for spread assets when volatility and valuations are compressed. Risk of stagflation damaging corporate earnings, plus tying the hands of monetary policy authorities has led to a material repricing of credit risk.
payload.subject: Corporate credit outlook

tool_args.label: High Yield outlook assessment
tool_args.raw_text: The trade war is likely to lead to a recessionary growth backdrop with inflation remaining elevated. This will challenge the earnings for HY and lead to weakening credit metrics and a likely rise in default rates as the year progresses.

payload.claim_text: The trade war is likely to lead to a recessionary growth backdrop with inflation remaining elevated. This will challenge the earnings for HY and lead to weakening credit metrics and a likely rise in default rates as the year progresses.
payload.subject: High Yield credit outlook
